events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young and still bringing the peace and love! Ringo Starr, the man who kept the beat for the Fab Four, is celebrating today. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God Turns 79
angles.copy: From stadium-rocking riffs to star-gazing, Brian May is 79 today! What's the Queen track where his guitar work truly shines for you?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still defying gravity on stage! Wishing the one and only Mick Jagger a very happy birthday. What's your top Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star?
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it, though? We're still here! What was the first music video you remember seeing?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's the track that still gives you goosebumps?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, took place in 1969.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. If you could have been there, who would you have wanted to see?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death (1977)
events.blurb: This day marks the 49th anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we lost the King, Elvis Presley. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death (1996)
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot dead in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years ago, the music world lost a true icon with the death of Tupac Shakur. His words and impact still resonate today. What's your most powerful Tupac lyric?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death (1970)
events.blurb: This day marks the 56th anniversary of the passing of legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since the world lost the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix. His guitar work redefined music forever. What's his most electrifying track?

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That zebra crossing, those timeless tracks... what's your favourite moment from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The trailblazing lead singer of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon Turns 75
angles.copy: Seventy-five years of cool, attitude, and incredible music! Happy Birthday to the one and only Chrissie Hynde. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It Birthday
angles.copy: Fifty-four today! Happy Birthday to the man, the myth, the legend, Liam Gallagher. What's your go-to Oasis anthem or solo track?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic solo album 'Imagine' on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Turns 51
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message that resonates just as strongly today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple launched the original iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: The Original iPod Turns 25
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod dropped and changed how we listen to music forever. How many songs did your first iPod hold, and what was on repeat?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme songs, 007 has it all. What's your favourite Bond film or theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary artist, John Lennon. His music and message of peace continue to inspire. What's the Lennon song that moves you most?
